title: Funii
description: a stupid and random Minecraft plugin 🔥
body:
**It's an interesting plugin that has 0 purpose.**

Funii allows you to have simple administration commands and features that most plugins have, but are not interesting. # Features - Gamemode Commands - Change your gamemode easily with the commands we have! - Fun Commands - Have fun with your friends and possibly **prank** them. 😏 - Flight - Pretty self-explanatory, you can fly. 🪽 # Commands
Gamemode CMDS - gmc -> Switch to creative mode - gms -> Switch to survival mode - gma -> Switch to adventure mode - gmsp -> Switch to spectator mode - gm -> Switch to a certain mode
Time CMDS - day -> Change the world's time to day - noon -> Change the world's time to noon - night -> Change the world's time to night - midnight -> Change the world's time to midnight
Fun CMDS - fly -> Toggle flight on/off - stick -> Obtain a fireball stick - back -> Go back to your death location - invsee -> View a player's inventory
# Permissions - `funii.gm` -> Access to gamemode commands - `funii.fun` -> Access to fun commands - `funii.dev` -> Access to development commands (/funii) - `funii.back` -> Access to /back command - `funii.time` -> Change the time in a world - `funii.invsee` -> View a player's inventory # Contributing & Source [https://github.com/uhAlexz/Funii](https://github.com/uhAlexz/Funii)
